title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - **Root cause:** the repo smoke harness bypasses the deterministic launcher path. Prompt smoke contract requires hard override and exact 3-line output ([kernel.md](/Users/masayuki/.codex/prompts/kernel.md#L16)), and launcher already has explicit synthetic smoke emitters (`maybe_emit_smoke_result*`) that print those lines without model/tool execution ([codex-prompt-launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L756), [codex-prompt-launch](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L814)). But the smoke harness executes `codex exec "/kernel ..."` directly ([check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L178)), so smoke behavior depends on LLM compliance instead of the deterministic transport guard. - **Smallest robust fix:** in `run_kernel_smoke`, invoke the resolved launcher (`codex-prompt-launch kernel SMOKE_RESULT_MARKER=...`, or `${LAUNCHER_FILE} kernel ...`) instead of raw `codex exec /kernel ...`. This keeps smoke verification deterministic and aligned with the same path that enforces canonical prompt routing and synthetic smoke interception.
